suggestions.text: Growth momentum leading — CT/CDC sprint and Helm expansion are primary drivers.
Katy TX trip crosses Family + Travel — consider combining signals.
Photography signals cooling. Last capture session: 6 days ago.

digest: Two pillars running hot. Growth is pulling ahead on the strength of the CT/CDC proof-of-concept and the Helm system build — both generating consistent daily signals. Travel is surging with Katy TX planning crossing into Family territory. Photography has gone quiet; may want to schedule a shoot this weekend to keep the momentum honest.

ops_report.summary: Dash caught API key exposure Night 3, tracked remediation across 4 nights. Port 7777 respawn loop resolved Night 5. 401 storm declining to baseline. Recon averaging 8.47/10 across 6 scored missions. Git history purge completed — MyAtlas repo clean.

findings.text: API key unrotated in helm-capture/config.py — tracked since Night 3

fix_requests.text: API key rotation + git history purge

ops_report.decisions_summary: Deploy Dash Helm System Module, Source Pipeline Phase 1, Re-dispatch Digest Integration, Hold Recon at L1, Tighten Dash constitution
